en-US.name: Goodnight Sweetheart
en-US.summary: Schedules loving bedtime reminders with Alexa.
en-US.description: Goodnight Sweetheart lets customers set one bedtime for every day or custom bedtimes for specific days. At each scheduled time, Alexa delivers a warm bedtime reminder designed to leave the customer feeling appreciated, loved, and grateful before sleep.
examplePhrases: Alexa, ask sweetheart bedtime to set my bedtime for 10 PM every day
Alexa, ask sweetheart bedtime what my bedtime schedule is

publishingInformation.testingInstructions: Grant reminder permissions when prompted. Test one every-day schedule, one custom-day schedule, schedule readback, single-day clear, and full clear. Confirm reminder delivery happens as Alexa reminder audio on device.
